description_long: This object is a long-barreled shotgun with a traditional wooden full stock and fore-end, featuring a dark metallic receiver and barrel. The barrel is slender and extends significantly from the receiver, with no visible ribbing or venting along its length. The stock is ergonomically shaped, with a slight curve and a textured butt plate for shoulder support. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger. The receiver appears robust and streamlined, with minimal external controls or embellishments. The overall finish combines matte wood grain with a smooth, dark metal surface, giving it a classic and utilitarian appearance.
description: A classic long-barreled shotgun with a wooden full stock and a dark, smooth metal barrel and receiver. The design is streamlined and traditional, with a rounded trigger guard and ergonomic stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the minimal width of the receiver and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock's curvature and the barrel's length.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
